title: Fun Time Bethany The Butterfly Activity Toy, Multi-Colored,55371
features: Suitable for age 6 months and upwards
Watch the tumbling beads inside the butterfly
description: Product Description This multicoloured Bethany the Butterfly activity toy from Fun Time makes an ideal choice for your young toddler. It’s educational, sturdy and the fun and games never stop. Push and spin the beads around the friendly butterfly's wings. Watch the brightly coloured beads tumble and spin inside the butterfly's body.We can’t promise that the Fun Time range of toys will make your child a genius, but they will certainly stimulate their senses and help to develop their skills. There’s only one word for Bethany the Butterfly and that word is “FUN”.This product conforms to EN71 and the Toy Safety Directive. Please remove all packaging before giving it to your child. This toy is suitable for age 6 months and upwards. Box Contains 1 x Bethany the Butterfly toy
